violations.text: Liquid eggs and bread (food prep area display case) were observed marked with a date that exceeded the 7-day limit for TCS foods. Staff voluntarily disposed of items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The (floor) in the (meat) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per interview PIC floors are in process of being replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

The following areas: -underneath equipment in back ware-washing - floors and shelving (other debris) in back storage - under/behind equipment and floors in prepared food area - shelves in aisles (food debris) - under the front of meat display case (other debris) has an accumulation of food debris, other debris and droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The presence of (pest) is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed in dry storage area and prepared foods area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must contact a licensed pest control service to conduct a full assessment/evaluation of facility. Pest control service must provide a plan of action detailing treatment plans and a target date to eliminate pests. Plan of action must be emailed to inspector before the re-inspection date. Per interview of PIC pest control is due to service establishment this week (10/27/2025). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the (3-bay sink) is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The (floors) in the (meat) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per interview PIC floors are in process of being replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the following: -back ware-washing area -back storage area -prepared foods area -front staff/storage room Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

olation of Code: 6-501.12 The back dry storage room, floors in the W/I cooler, and prepared foods area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

Crispy cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

The presence of (pest) is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed in dry storage area and prepared foods area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must contact a licensed pest control service to conduct a full assessment/evaluation of facility. Pest control service must provide a plan of action detailing treatment plans and a target date to eliminate pests. Plan of action must be emailed to inspector before the re-inspection date. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the (3-bay sink) is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The (floors) in the (meat) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per interview PIC floors are in process of being replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the following: -back ware-washing area -back storage area -prepared foods area -front staff/storage room Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The back dry storage room, floors in the W/I cooler, and prepared foods area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a chest freezer. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Several foods in a display case were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Several foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

The hand-washing sink in the prep and ware-washing area was blocked by a chest freezer and boxes of food. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Raw animal foods (such as raw chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as tomatoes) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and meat cleaver) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Hummus and other prepared foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Several foods (such as dry ingredients) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

The following utensils were observed improperly stored: 1) Scoops were stored in dry ingredients with the handle in direct contact with food 2) A scoop meant for consumer use was stored on unclean surfaces of storage rack New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
